pattern_sources.author: Karoline Skovgaard Bentsen
pattern_sources.name: Aegyoknit Website
pattern_sources.notes:
Behind Aegyoknit you will find the creator Karoline Skovgaard Bentsen. 

**THE STORY BEHIND AEGYOKNIT**
It was not in the cards that Karoline would find her self working as a fulltime knit pattern designer, when she got her masters degree in Comparative Literature from Syddansk University in 2021. But life wanted otherwise, and the urge to work with her creativity took over, as it had always been a part of her life through hobbies and interests. 

Aegyoknit was created in march 2022 and the name *'ageyo'* (pronunciation: *egg-yo*) was meant to include some of the Korean culture to the brand, as Karoline is married to her South Korean man. The name symbolizes the feminine and playfullness that Karoline likes to add to her patterns. 

**THE** ***AEGYO*** **SIGNATURE** 
Her focus has always been on making modern knitting patterns, with the keywords: *minimalistic, meticulous, and oversized silhouettes.* All with interpretations from the scandinavian and korean fashion. You will also always find small *stories* in the patterns that Karoline likes to add, as the patterns are made much consideration and empathy. 

**THE PATTERNS**
At Aegyoknit you will find knit patterns in all different stages of difficulty, some beginners friendly and some for the more adventurous and experienced knitters, which allows you to develop and try out new skills and techniques. 

**GENERAL INFORMATIOM**
> For any inquiries in regards to
> patterns or support, please contact
> the aegyoknit-team on e-mail
> info@aegyoknit.com. For more information and frequently asked questions see more on the homepage www.aegyoknit.com. You can follow the
> brand Aegyoknit on Instagram and TikTok
> for more inspiration and information.

**Thank you** for supporting a small danish creator. 

// Karoline  

Website language is English. 
Patterns are available (May 2022) in these languages>
Dansk
Norsk
English
Deutsch
Français
Korean
**Not all Patterns are available in all of these languages**

pattern_sources.author: Maja Kløvdal
pattern_sources.name: Other Loops_
pattern_sources.notes:
Other Loops / otherloops.com

> If you have questions, comments or
> need knitting support, you are welcome
> to write to us on
> support@otherloops.com

 

Behind Other Loops you will meet up with Maja Kløvdal, who has a degree as fashion designer from the Design School Kolding in Denmark “DK:DK” Since her education, Maja has made a career in the fashion industry, where she has worked and accelerated the growth for several well-known Danish fashion brands.

Other Loops are born from Maja’s dream of making more slow fashion and returning to her own roots, which is to create and develop on the actual craft.
Maja focus on aesthetics, quality and details that go side by side with the traditions of Scandinavian design.

Maja create classic and modern knitwear patterns that suite your needs of long-lasting design. Other Loops put heart into developing precise patterns that are straight forward for you to understand, so your personal knitting skills elevate up to next level.

Otherloops.com develop aesthetic quality design for you and the future to come.

For more inspiration you can also follow the brand on Instagram @otherloops
If you have questions, comments or need knitting support, you are welcome to write to us on support@otherloops.com 
Pattern is solely for private use and must not be copied, resold, or shared. Products made from the patterns may not be sold.

> If you have questions, comments or
> need knitting support, you are welcome
> to write to us on
> support@otherloops.com

Happy loops!

> diverse collection and find your next
> favorite project. Add any 3 (or more)
> patterns to your cart and receive an
> automatic 20% discount on your entire
> purchase – no code needed. Embark on a
> crafting journey and experience the
> joy of knitting with Wool & Pine.**
